issues.description: Missing second action: after KO effect, opponent gets choice to add 1 DON!! from their DON!! deck and set it as active. Current DSL only includes KO action.
Second effect is completely wrong. Should describe opponent's optional DON!! activation, not a self-play trigger based on HasRestingDon condition. This appears to be unrelated card logic.
Target scope should allow 0-1 selection (up to 1), but 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' with maxCost:3 may not properly represent 'up to' semantics. Should clarify maximum selection is 1 optional.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 3 or less. Then, your opponent may add 1 DON!! card from their DON!! deck and set it as active.
